subcodes.title: Words spoken on board the SS Baron Call  at sea, 1913-12-03
subcodes.first_line: If a soul is not severed, if he is not pure and holy, if he is not thoughtful of others.. No one can say he is a Bahá'í.
subcodes.subjects: @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @attaining the life of the spirit, @the golden rule; regard for one's neighbor; doing unto others, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
